title: Keep WASM builds debuggable
description: Ship DWARF/source maps in dev and keep panic/trap messages so a WASM fault maps back to source.
body: Use when setting up the WASM build and toolchain. Do not strip all debug info and disable panic messages in development, because a bare WASM trap (unreachable, out-of-bounds) gives a meaningless stack with no source location. Actions: build dev with debug symbols/DWARF and keep panic hooks (e.g. console_error_panic_hook) so panics print a real message and stack; for release, strip and optimize but keep a way to symbolize a crash from a saved map. Validation signals include a deliberately triggered panic/trap showing a source-level location and message in dev tools. Risk boundary: shipping a release build whose only crash signal is 'unreachable' makes incidents undiagnosable; retain symbolication for the deployed artifact.
